meta.note: Slack-sourced NOI approvals from #angus_managers (posted by Luc: well + permit # + Dropbox link). Authoritative for 'approved' status and permit link; merged into the dashboard by build_dashboard.py. Each entry: well_norm -> {well_display, approved_date, permit, url, source_ts, acked}. The scheduled task appends here and reacts to Luc's message.
